description: 41 workflow evals, 112 assertions — comprehensive Odoo UI/UX coverage across form, list, kanban, calendar, pivot, graph, dashboard, activity, settings views plus RPC API and advanced debugging patterns

evals.prompt: Login to Odoo (admin/admin) at http://localhost:8069. Navigate to Contacts. Create a new contact with name 'PT. Maju Bersama', phone '+6281234567890', email 'info@maju.com', street 'Jl. Sudirman No.1', and set country to Indonesia. Save the record.
evals.expected_output: playwright-cli commands to fill all mentioned fields and save

assertions.text: SKILL.md contains [name='login'] selector for login
SKILL.md contains [name='password'] selector
SKILL.md contains [name='name'] form field selector
SKILL.md contains [name='phone'] selector
SKILL.md contains [name='email'] selector
SKILL.md contains [name='street'] selector
SKILL.md contains country_id dropdown selector pattern
SKILL.md contains save button selector (data-hotkey or .o_form_button_save)
SKILL.md has login workflow section
SKILL.md has create-record workflow section

evals.prompt: In Odoo form view, fill a date field (date of birth) to '2020-01-15' and a datetime field (appointment time) to '2020-01-15 14:30:00'.
evals.expected_output: playwright-cli commands to interact with datepicker and datetimepicker widgets

assertions.text: SKILL.md contains datepicker_input or date field selector pattern
SKILL.md contains datetime picker selector pattern
SKILL.md contains o_datepicker_picker date selection pattern

evals.prompt: In Odoo form, use a Many2one field (e.g., 'Responsible Person') to search and select 'Administrator' from the dropdown/autocomplete.
evals.expected_output: playwright-cli commands for Many2one autocomplete interaction

assertions.text: SKILL.md contains Many2one or many2one field selector pattern
SKILL.md contains autocomplete dropdown selection (.o-autocomplete--dropdown-item)
SKILL.md contains o_select_menu pattern for selection dropdowns

SKILL.md contains check/uncheck playwright-cli command

assertions.text: SKILL.md contains monetary or currency field selector
SKILL.md contains odoo-assert-readonly or computed field assertion

evals.prompt: In Odoo list view, sort records by 'Name' column (ascending), then open a specific record by double-clicking its row. Then select multiple records using checkboxes and click Action > Delete.
evals.expected_output: playwright-cli commands for sort, double-click open, multi-select, and action menu

assertions.text: SKILL.md contains list view row selector (o_data_row)
SKILL.md contains double-click (dblclick) command for opening records
SKILL.md contains checkbox selection pattern (o_list_record_selector)
SKILL.md contains Action menu pattern (.o_list_button_action)
SKILL.md contains pagination pattern (o_pager_next/previous)

evals.expected_output: playwright-cli commands for inline cell editing in list view

assertions.text: SKILL.md contains inline edit pattern in list view
SKILL.md contains list save/discard pattern

evals.prompt: Use Playwright to execute a JSON-RPC call directly against the Odoo /web/dataset/call_kw endpoint: call res.partner search_read to get the first 5 partner names without using the UI.
evals.expected_output: playwright-cli run-code or eval commands to make RPC calls using fetch() in browser context

assertions.text: SKILL.md contains JSON-RPC or RPC call pattern using fetch()
SKILL.md contains /web/dataset/call_kw endpoint URL pattern
SKILL.md contains search_read or create model method call pattern

evals.prompt: In an Odoo sale order form, identify which fields are readonly/computed (e.g., 'Amount Total', 'Create Date'). Use JavaScript to check if a field has the o_readonly_modifier CSS class. Assert that computed fields cannot be edited.

assertions.text: SKILL.md contains o_readonly_modifier class for readonly field detection
SKILL.md contains o_field_monetary or computed field value selector
SKILL.md contains odoo-assert-readonly or readonly check assertion
